description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The category of the command. LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.command The command.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.category

outputs.description: The description of the command. LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.mitreid The MITRE ID related to the command.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.description

outputs.description: The operating system the command ran on. LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.privileges The privileges required to run the command.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.operatingsystem

outputs.description: The use case of the command. LOLBAS.Indicators.Description The description of the indicator.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Commands.usecase

outputs.description: The content of the detection. LOLBAS.Indicators.Detections.type The type of the detection.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Detections.content

outputs.description: The name of the indicator. LOLBAS.Indicators.Paths.path The path of the indicator.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Name

outputs.description: The type of the indicator. LOLBAS.Indicators.URL The URL to the indicator.
outputs.name: LOLBAS.Indicators.Type
